docs:
# Spotlight Card
A card surface that blooms with a radial spotlight under the cursor.
## Import
```tsx
import { SpotlightCard } from "@/components/ui/spotlight-card";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<SpotlightCard spotlightColor="#a855f7" spotlightOpacity={0.18} title={undefined} description={undefined} showFooter={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **spotlightColor** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Spotlight color
- **spotlightOpacity** (number) — default: `0.18`: Opacity
- **title** (string): Title
- **description** (string): Description
- **showFooter** (boolean): Show footer
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add spotlight-card
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/spotlight-card
```
